mappings.rationale: Renamed from cl_recid to claimant_id to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_fnam to first_name to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_lnam to last_name to align with modern naming conventions
SHA-256 hash for HIPAA compliance — raw SSN must NEVER be written to modern system; duplicate SSNs indicate identity conflicts requiring manual resolution before migration proceeds
Renamed from cl_dob to date_of_birth to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_phon to phone_number to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_emal to email to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_adr1 to address_line1 to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_city to city to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_st to state to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_zip to zip_code to align with modern naming conventions

Bank account number NOT migrated — PCI-DSS regulated financial identifier; must be archived to encrypted vault and claimants re-enrolled through secure portal. Archive alongside cl_brtn. Any plaintext exposure is a PCI-DSS Level 1 violation. Do NOT include in ETL pipeline.

Bank routing number NOT migrated — PCI-DSS regulated financial identifier. Archive alongside cl_bact to encrypted vault. Routing numbers combined with account numbers constitute full banking credentials — any plaintext exposure is a PCI-DSS Level 1 violation. Do NOT include in ETL pipeline.

Status codes normalised: 'ACTIVE'→'active', 'INACTIVE'→'inactive', 'SUSPENDED'→'suspended'. Legacy freetext values must be mapped; unmapped values default to 'pending_review' and flagged for manual triage.
Renamed from cl_rgdt to registered_at to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cl_dcsd to is_deceased to align with modern naming conventions
Legacy filler/padding field with no business meaning — safe to drop. Verify no application code reads this field before finalising ETL.
er_recid (legacy integer sequence) migrated to UUID-based employer_id in modern system; ETL must generate stable UUIDs and update all FK references in claims and payments before cutover.
Renamed from er_name to employer_name for improved clarity and naming consistency
Renamed from er_ein to employer_ein to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_ind to industry to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_adr1 to address_line1 to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_city to city to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_st to state to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_zip to zip_code to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from er_phon to phone_number to align with modern naming conventions
Employer status codes normalised to modern enum values; legacy freetext statuses require mapping table review before ETL runs.
Renamed from cm_recid to claim_id to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_clmnt to claimant_id to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed to employer_id as FK to employers table; orphan risk if employer records not fully migrated first — run employer migration before claims ETL.
Renamed from cm_seprs to separation_reason to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_fildt to filing_date to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_bystr to benefit_year_start; date format normalised from YYYYMMDD integer to ISO-8601 date string — ETL must parse and reformat all values.
Renamed from cm_byend to benefit_year_end to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_wkamt to weekly_benefit_amount to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_mxamt to max_benefit_amount to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_totpd to total_paid to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from cm_wkcnt to weeks_claimed to align with modern naming conventions

Claim status normalised to modern enum; CRITICAL business rule: claims with cm_stat='PAID' where cm_totpd < cm_mxamt indicate potential overpayment — flag for compliance review before migration completes.
Renamed from cm_lupdt to updated_at to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_recid to payment_id to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_clmid to claim_id to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_paydt to payment_date to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_payam to payment_amount to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_methd to payment_method to align with modern naming conventions
Renamed from bp_wkedt to week_ending_date to align with modern naming conventions
Payment status normalised to modern enum values ('ISSUED', 'CLEARED', 'VOIDED'); legacy 'CANC' code maps to 'VOIDED' — validate all payment records before and after transform.
Renamed from bp_chkno to check_number to align with modern naming conventions
